subcodes.first_line: O Taraz! Praise be to God Who hath adorned thee with the ornament of divine knowledge and illumined thy heart with the lights of certitude. Say: Praise be unto Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا طراز الحمد لله الذی زینک بطراز العرفان و نور قلبک بانوار الیقین قل لک الحمد
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @praise and encouragement
